testcase.name: test_employee_delete_cascade_pod_membership
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration41_cascade.py:165: in test_employee_delete_cascade_pod_membership assert add_member_response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to add member to pod: {add_member_response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to add member to pod: {"detail":[{"type":"enum","loc":["body","pod_role"],"msg":"Input should be 'team_lead', 'bdr', 'csm', 'technician' or 'support_agent'","input":"member","ctx":{"expected":"'team_lead', 'bdr', 'csm', 'technician' or 'support_agent'"}}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
